name: Gujarti Style Roasted Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a baking dish with oil and spread the potatoes in a single layer.
3. Spray the potatoes with oil and sprinkle with paprika.
4. Bake until pale gold and just cooked, about 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Scrape the potatoes into a mixing bowl; fold in carrots and parsley.
6. Preheat a pan over moderately high heat.
7. Add mustard seeds and cover; cook until they begin to splutter.
8. Add cumin seeds and cook gently for a few seconds.
9. Remove the pan from the heat and add olive oil, stock, and lemon juice. Whisk to mix.
10. Pour over the vegetables, season with salt and pepper, and toss to mix.
11. Garnish with pistachios.
